hero.title: Passer
hero.subtitle: The seamless bridge between your iPhone and PC.
hero.description: A ultra-fast, cross-device clipboard and file transfer utility designed for maximum productivity.

instant_sync.title: Instant Sync
instant_sync.description: Copy on PC, paste on iPhone (or vice versa) over your local network.

passer_space.title: Passer Space
passer_space.description: A local WebDAV server that turns your PC into a wireless shared drive for your iPhone.

premium_ux.title: Premium UX
premium_ux.description: A sleek, glassmorphic Windows interface that docks at the bottom-right of your screen.

privacy_first.title: Privacy First
privacy_first.description: Everything stays on your local network. No cloud, no external servers.

shortcuts.title: iPhone ↔️ PC Workflow
shortcuts.subtitle: Passer leverages iOS Shortcuts for a deeply integrated experience.

push.title: Push
push.description: Send anything (Clipboard, Files, Photos, Text) from iPhone to PC.

pull.title: Pull
pull.description: Retrieve your PC's current clipboard and save it to your iPhone instantly.

pass.title: Pass
pass.description: Send content to your PC directly from the Apple Share Sheet.

footer.built_with: Built with ❤️ for speed and simplicity.
footer.author: Created by Walson Argan René
